description_long: This is a handmade doll with a tall, oval-shaped head and a slender, elongated body. The surface appears to be made of a rough, light-colored material, possibly cloth or papier-mâché, with visible stains and wear. The face is decorated with painted features, including large, round eyes, a red vertical stripe down the forehead, and a dark patch above the right eye. The doll has two thin, stick-like arms extending outward, and its legs are narrow and slightly bent. There are visible holes and tears in the torso, suggesting age or damage, and the overall appearance is rustic and primitive. The back of the head and body are plain, with no additional decoration.
description: A tall, slender handmade doll with a painted face, stick-like arms, and a worn, light-colored surface featuring visible holes and primitive decorations.
description_view_0: The back view shows the plain, rounded head and body with visible stains and a large tear in the torso.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the protruding stick-like arm and the curvature of the body, with a red spot visible on the head.
description_view_2: The front view displays the painted facial features, including large eyes, a red stripe, and a dark patch, as well as the damaged torso and both arms.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the other stick-like arm and another red spot on the head, with the face partially visible.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll does not appear to be wearing any distinct clothing; its body is covered in a single, light-colored material with painted decorations and no visible garments or fabric patterns.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended outward at an angle, legs straight and slightly apart, and the head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with wide, round eyes, a straight painted mouth, and a red vertical stripe suggesting a stylized or ceremonial look.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and unadorned, with painted decorations instead of hair.
